notes: Probe-validated but PARTIAL - full text, NO DATES. 30 speech PDFs. country=Ethiopia; source_url=https://pmo.gov.et/speeches/; region=Africa; iso3n=231; source_type=PM Website; content_format=fulltext | Ethiopia's PM is the head of government, so this is the high-value Ethiopian source (eth_thepresidency is ceremonial AND its domain is dead). Speeches are PDFs; bodies extract cleanly in Amharic and English (1.9k-10.8k chars) and the PDF's FIRST LINE is exactly the title (matches the listing verbatim), so title needs no selector. pagination=none is correct (?page=/?paged= are ignored and re-serve page 1). ALL 30 ROWS ARE UNDATED: the date exists ONLY on the listing ('Oct. 6, 2023 | <title> | Download here') and the engine cannot carry listing metadata onto a PDF row -> issue #55; this is the sole reason for partial rather than draft. DO NOT recover the date from the filename: those use the ETHIOPIAN calendar (~7-8 yrs behind) - '..._2015.pdf' is listed as Jan 27 2023, and 'PM_Message_Adwa2014.pdf' is the Adwa 126th anniversary = 2022. The LISTING dates are Gregorian, 2018-05..2023-10, i.e. it spans Abiy's term but with only 30 items and nothing since Oct 2023.
